items.title: Resultant force on a hoist
items.standaloneContext: A hoist platform has a 120 N upward force and a 90 N downward force. Treat upward as positive.
items.prompt: What is the resultant force on the platform?

feedback.success: The signed sum is $+120\,\text{N} - 90\,\text{N} = +30\,\text{N}$, so the resultant is 30 N upward.
misconceptions: Zero would require equal opposing forces.
Adding magnitudes without keeping their directions produces 210 N, not the resultant.
hints: Choose one direction as positive before adding the forces.
